RECEIVED AN EMAIL FROM A STORM SPOTTER AT MAY 5S ON HWY 183. THE SPOTTER REPORTED TEA CUP SIZE HAIL OR 3.00 INCHES.

WINDS ESTIMATED TO BE AROUND 70 MPH ON THE EAST SIDE OF ABILENE. LARGE DIAMETER TREES WERE SNAPPED...POWER POLES SNAPPED AT THE INTERSECTION OF EAST HIGHWAY 80 AND JUDGE ELY BLVD. STORAGE UNITS TURNED OVER.

A MEMBER OF THE RAINFALL NETWORK CALLED WITH A REPORT OF DOWNED TREE LIMBS. THE AVERAGE DIAMETER OF THE LIMB WAS APPROX 2 INCHES. THE OBSERVER ALSO REPORTED A 62 MPH WIND GUST MEASURED WITH HIS ANEMOMETER.
